rules.rule_statement: Payments are made based on a compliant invoice.
rules.action_or_limit: Net 60 days from invoice date

rules.rule_statement: Payments adjustments are based on the guidelines outlined in Appendix F.
rules.action_or_limit: As per Appendix F

rules.rule_statement: Payments will refer to the compensation terms specified in Appendix B.
rules.action_or_limit: As per Appendix B

rules.rule_statement: Requests to amend Appendix B – Compensation must be submitted by the Contractor at least 30 days prior to the proposed effective date of the requested change.
rules.action_or_limit: Submit requests at least 30 days in advance

rules.rule_statement: The Contractor will invoice Suncor at least monthly for the Cost Reimbursable Work completed in the applicable month.
rules.trigger_condition: Cost Reimbursable Work completed in the applicable month
rules.action_or_limit: Invoice at least monthly

rules.rule_statement: Amendments to the Hourly Base Rates and Burdens require written approval in accordance with Paragraph 61.3 – Amendments.
rules.trigger_condition: Changes to the Hourly Base Rates and Burdens
rules.action_or_limit: Require written approval

rules.rule_statement: Rate adjustments may be subject to Suncor's discretion for review of the basis of the adjustment.
rules.trigger_condition: Proposed rate changes to Allocated Costs
rules.action_or_limit: Subject to review

rules.rule_statement: Invoices must meet the requirements set by Suncor's invoicing standards and must include compliant supporting documentation.
rules.action_or_limit: Must comply with Suncor's invoicing standards and policies.
rules.external_reference_source: Appendix B – Compensation and the Invoicing Requirements

rules.rule_statement: Reimbursable Personnel shall not be compensated for specific non-travel related expenses.
rules.trigger_condition: Expense Category is communication, entertainment, food or beverage, or pet or companion costs
rules.action_or_limit: No compensation provided

rules.rule_statement: Compensation is allowed for certain types of travel expenses.
rules.trigger_condition: Expenses incurred by Reimbursable Personnel while traveling for business
rules.action_or_limit: Compensation includes Air fare, Bus fare, Taxi fare, and Mileage at $0.52/km

rules.rule_statement: Reimbursable Personnel must provide documentation for travel expenses to be reimbursed.
rules.trigger_condition: For air, bus, or taxi travel expenses
rules.action_or_limit: Must provide itinerary showing total cost and boarding passes or receipts

rules.rule_statement: Approval is required for any additional out of pocket expenses incurred due to changes in travel plans.
rules.trigger_condition: Reimbursable Personnel is asked to change and/or reschedule travel plans after booking
rules.action_or_limit: Approval must be obtained from a Suncor director for additional expenses

rules.rule_statement: Specific setup is defined for entering charges and travel allowances.
rules.trigger_condition: Entering charges into Suncor’s system for Home Return Travel Allowance
rules.action_or_limit: Use service master number #3009084 for Direct Labour and #3008309 for Indirect Labour

rules.rule_statement: Compensation for overtime for Indirect Labour and non-union Direct Labour Personnel is according to the agreed shift schedule.
rules.action_or_limit: Overtime hourly rates as per Attachment CR 3
rules.external_reference_source: Attachment CR 3 – Union Direct Labour Reimbursable Positions and Rates

rules.rule_statement: If overtime is required outside of the pre-approved shift schedule, prior verbal approval from Suncor must be obtained.
rules.action_or_limit: Verification of approval in writing using the Overtime Approval Form

rules.rule_statement: Direct Labour Union Personnel approved to work overtime shall be compensated for overtime meals as per the applicable collective bargaining agreement.
rules.trigger_condition: Direct Labour Union Personnel working overtime
rules.action_or_limit: Overtime meal rates as set out in Attachment CR 3
rules.external_reference_source: Attachment CR 3 – Union Direct Labour Reimbursable Positions and Rates

rules.rule_statement: Attach backup to support attendance/OT; if swipe is missing, an exclusive sign IN/OUT sheet must be provided.
rules.action_or_limit: Sign IN/OUT sheet with signature and start/end times required

rules.rule_statement: Shifts may be amended depending on the requirements of the Work.
rules.action_or_limit: Shift schedules are subject to modification
rules.external_reference_source: Appendix A – Scope of Work, Paragraph 9 Schedule and Sequence of Work

rules.rule_statement: The agreed upon cost for any or all of the material shall be based on the applicable Rates for Scaffolding Material as specified.
rules.action_or_limit: Refer to the Scaffolding Material Used Rate or Scaffolding Material New Rate.
rules.external_reference_source: Exhibit CR 6 – Suncor Approved Inventory List

rules.rule_statement: The Contractor shall not receive any mark-up, Fee, or Overhead on light vehicles.
rules.action_or_limit: No mark-up on light vehicles.

rules.rule_statement: The Contractor shall identify opportunities to offset rate increases.
rules.action_or_limit: Offset all or a portion of the cost impact through changes to compensation.

rules.rule_statement: Actual rates for Contractor supplied goods, materials, or services must adhere to the pricing structure outlined.
rules.action_or_limit: Follow Attachment CR 1, CR 2, CR 3, and CR 4.
rules.external_reference_source: Attachment CR 1 – Indirect Labour Reimbursable Positions and Rates, Attachment CR 2 – Non-Union Direct Labour Reimbursable Positions and Rates, Attachment CR 3 – Union Direct Labour Reimbursable Positions and Rates

rules.rule_statement: The compensation for changes includes all direct and indirect costs, overhead, profit, and other impacts.
rules.action_or_limit: Includes all relevant costs and expenses

rules.rule_statement: All changes must include a description of the scope of the Change Order and relevant details.
rules.action_or_limit: Scope description and details are to be provided

rules.rule_statement: Schedule and compensation adjustments must be documented in accordance with the Change Order.
rules.action_or_limit: Adjustment to be quantified and documented

rules.rule_statement: The Contract is changed only by agreement of both parties in accordance with the specified precedence of documents.
rules.action_or_limit: Changes are to follow the specified order of precedence

rules.rule_statement: Financial Security must be provided in an amount no less than the amount of the reduction being sought by the Contractor.
rules.trigger_condition: Contractor seeks reduction in financial security
rules.action_or_limit: Financial Security amount must equal the reduction sought

rules.rule_statement: The liability of the Contractor is limited to the greater of all amounts of applicable insurance coverage required to be maintained under the Contract.
rules.action_or_limit: Liability limited to insurance coverage amount

rules.rule_statement: Professional Liability Insurance must cover professional negligence with a limit of not less than $5 million per claim.
rules.trigger_condition: Professional services are provided by Contractor
rules.action_or_limit: $5 million limit per claim

rules.rule_statement: Automobile Liability Insurance must have limits of not less than $2 million for injuries or deaths caused.
rules.trigger_condition: Use of vehicles in services provided
rules.action_or_limit: $2 million limit

rules.rule_statement: Payments made to the Contractor or reductions of the Holdback Amount do not constitute approval or acceptance of work.
rules.trigger_condition: Payments or Holdback reductions are processed
rules.action_or_limit: No approval or acceptance implied

rules.rule_statement: Suncor can audit the records of the Contractor and its Subcontractors.
rules.action_or_limit: Contractor must provide access to records and copies as needed.

rules.rule_statement: The Contractor must provide audited financial statements upon request.
rules.action_or_limit: Audited statements for the preceding fiscal year within 14 days before the Effective Date and within 120 days after the end of each fiscal year during the Term.

rules.rule_statement: If Suncor conducts an audit and identifies claims, the limitation period for those claims starts from the date the final audit report is issued.
rules.action_or_limit: Limitation period commences upon the final audit report issuance.

rules.rule_statement: Demobilization is not payable if Reimbursable Personnel leave the project before the end of their expected shift or term at the Site.
rules.trigger_condition: Reimbursable Personnel leave before shift or term end
rules.action_or_limit: No demobilization payment

rules.rule_statement: The Contractor will be compensated for initial mobilization and final demobilization expenses.
rules.trigger_condition: Start and end of the project
rules.action_or_limit: Payment for mobilization and demobilization expenses

rules.rule_statement: Contractor shall not receive additional compensation for meal, accommodation, and temporary relocation allowances as these are part of Living Out Allowance expenses.
rules.trigger_condition: Claims for meals, accommodations, temporary relocation
rules.action_or_limit: No additional payment outside Living Out Allowance

rules.rule_statement: Commute time and costs for Reimbursable Personnel are not compensated unless pre-approved by Suncor’s Representative.
rules.trigger_condition: Commute for Reimbursable Personnel without pre-approval
rules.action_or_limit: No compensation for commute
